name: OMN_NET
description: CDC: firewalls, DDoS protection, OS hardening, and network configuration security.

name: OMN_IAM
description: CDC: centralized IAM (RBAC/IBAC/ABAC), MFA, geographic access restrictions, and least privilege.

name: OMN_MON
description: CDC: SIEM integration, log aggregation, and activity log retention.

name: OMN_RSK
description: CDC: penetration testing, risk assessment, and vulnerability scanning.

name: OMN_DAT
description: CDC: data classification, encryption in transit and at rest, BYOK/CMK, and cloud DLP.

name: OMN_END
description: CDC: antivirus and antimalware for all servers and user devices.

name: OMN_VUL
description: CDC: systematic patch management and vulnerability remediation.

name: OMN_BCM
description: CDC: automated backup and recovery for critical cloud-hosted data and services.

name: OMN_INC
description: CDC: documented cyber incident response plan for cloud environments.

name: OMN_GOV
description: CDC policy: data classification prerequisite and overall CDC policy compliance.
